> Do not open a public pull request containing an unresolved vulnerability. Use
> [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/Lamentis-operating-systems/nsit/security/advisories/new).

## Change

<!-- What problem does this solve, and what is deliberately out of scope? -->

## Contract impact

<!-- Does this affect format, identity, authority, compatibility, security, dependencies, or generated artifacts? Link an ADR where required. -->

## Evidence

<!-- List exact commands/results. For token claims include tokenizer, corpus, all context overhead, retries, and baseline. -->

## Claims

**Implemented and verified:**

<!-- Narrow claims supported by the evidence above. -->

**Explicitly not claimed:**

<!-- Limits, unsupported syntax, unknowns, and deferred work. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The source diff is focused and inspectable.
- [ ] Tests or documentation changed with observable behavior where applicable.
- [ ] New dependencies and generated artifacts are justified and reproducible.
- [ ] Secrets, personal data, and unresolved vulnerability details are absent.
- [ ] An ADR is linked for a material contract or architecture decision.
